dialog.humvil.about.desc:
Transforms villagers found in villages into humans (NPCs)!
This uses the new Mannequin entity.
dialog.humvil.config.desc: This datapack has the following available settings, this are the default options:
dialog.humvil.config.pool.name: New humans will be selected from
dialog.humvil.config.pool.options.1: Players that have joined this world and random ones.
dialog.humvil.config.pool.options.2: Only players that have joined this world.
dialog.humvil.config.mainhand.name: The main hand for the humans will be
dialog.humvil.config.mainhand.right-hand: If "Random" selected, percentage for the Human to be right-handed (rest for left-handed)
dialog.humvil.config.equipment.name: Humans inherit equipment from its original entity.
dialog.humvil.config.npc.allow_custom_ta: Override the "NPC" tag below the mannequin's name.
dialog.humvil.config.animations.name: Allow for animations in Humans (Swimming while on water, double-crouching while near players...).
dialog.humvil.config.conversations.allow: Allow for conversations between Humans and Players.
dialog.humvil.config.conversations.frequ: Chance per tick for a Human to start a conversation (1 = 0.01%%)
Specify which entities can be humanized
Only naturally spawning villagers & zombified villagers, once they have been cured, from structures (villages, igloo...).
Only transform the specified entities (via manual tags and functions).
names.humvil.conversation.2.participants: I hope it rains soon, it's really cool to watch it rain.
names.humvil.conversation.3.participants: The weather is great today, don't you think?
names.humvil.conversation.4.participants: An Iron Golem! I finally feel a bit safer here.
names.humvil.conversation.5.participants: I wonder if %s will want to buy something from me...
names.humvil.conversation.6.participants: What beautiful views I have from here!
names.humvil.conversation.7.participants: I don't feel like working today, I think I'll just zone out for a bit...
names.humvil.conversation.8.participants: I think I was about to say something...
But I think I forgot what it was...
names.humvil.conversation.9.participants: I was going to do something but I can't remember what it was...
names.humvil.conversation.11.participant: Hey %s, let me tell you a joke.
No, wait, there were 3... and the one on the side...
No, damn it, that's not how it goes...
Never mind... forget it... I can't remember how it went, I'll tell you another day.
(Damn, how embarrassing... they're going to think I'm dumb...)
names.humvil.conversation.1.participants: Hey, %s! Have you seen the Golem lately?
Yeah, it was patrolling near here not long ago.
names.humvil.conversation.2.participants: I'll trade you 3 bread for one emerald.
names.humvil.conversation.3.participants: Careful, %s, I think there's something behind that tree.
names.humvil.conversation.4.participants: Hi neighbor, how did you sleep?
Terrible, %s. There were monsters nearby and I couldn't sleep well.
names.humvil.conversation.5.participants: Hey %s, stop stepping on my crops.
names.humvil.conversation.6.participants: Look at that, %s is wearing really good armor.
They must have been in the mine for days, %s.
names.humvil.conversation.7.participants: Did you hear that? Is it a raid?
Relax %s, we have %s, nothing will happen to us.
names.humvil.conversation.8.participants: Thanks %s, I like it quite a lot.
names.humvil.conversation.9.participants: %s, can you lend me some coal?
Sorry, I sold it all to %s yesterday.
names.humvil.conversation.10.participant: I want to explore away from the village.
But why? It is perfectly safe here.
That's the problem. Nothing ever happens!
Peace is a blessing, my friend.
For you, maybe. For me, it's a cage. I need adventure.
names.humvil.conversation.1.participants: Does anyone know where the entrance to the mine is?
No, %s, the entrance is behind the hill, I saw it.
names.humvil.conversation.2.participants: What is it now, %s? I'm busy.
He probably wants to talk about emeralds again.
names.humvil.conversation.3.participants: That sword %s is carrying shines a lot.
I wish I could use one to defend myself from zombies...
names.humvil.conversation.4.participants: I'm hungry, does anyone have carrots?
Ask %s, I think he has some.
Sorry guys, I already gave the ones I had left to others.
names.humvil.conversation.5.participants: It's true, I agree with you.
names.humvil.conversation.6.participants: Tell %s, they're the one who keeps removing them and moving them into a cubicle.
Oh really? I wonder why they would be doing that...
names.humvil.conversation.7.participants: I defend all that is loved!
Only god can stop this paladin, alas, my time had came and left.
Sure... I guess I wield a sword too, what about you?
Must me a Lovely time to be a young lad, come over one day and we can have a drink or two!
How old is he to take like that?
names.humvil.conversation.1.participants: Hey, I think we should move.
Why? We have food and protection here.
%s is right, there are too many zombies at night.
I'm staying, %s promised to protect us.
names.humvil.conversation.2.participants: It wasn't me, I was with %s.
It's true, we were somewhere else.
I think I saw %s take it!
names.humvil.conversation.3.participants: And that %s finally lowered their prices!
names.humvil.conversation.4.participants: What? The End Update is coming out when?
names.humvil.conversation.5.participants: I need paper. A lot of paper.
I have leather, we can make books.
I can enchant those books if you bring me lapis lazuli.
And I'll sell them to %s for a fortune. Perfect team!
names.humvil.conversation.6.participants: I think it's going to rain soon.
I hate rain, Endermen get aggressive.
But it's good for fishing, right %s?
Yeah, but I'd rather stay home peacefully with %s.
names.humvil.conversation.7.participants: Awwww, look how cute the Baby Villager is!
He's jumping on my bed, make him stop!
Let him be, he's just playing.
names.humvil.conversation.8.participants: I think it fell into a hole.
Call %s, we need them to help us get it out.
names.humvil.conversation.9.participants: No one is forcing you to buy, %s.
%s always has the highest prices, it's true.
names.humvil.conversation.1.participants: I propose we work fewer hours.
But if we don't work, %s won't give us emeralds.
Yeah... that's true. Well then, back to work everyone.
names.humvil.conversation.2.participants: Wow, what a strange structure %s built.
It looks like some kind of farm or something... right?
It's a bit weird, don't you think?
I like it, it gives shade.
I like it too, it's cool.
names.humvil.conversation.4.participants: Hey, aren't the crops growing very slowly?
At this rate GTA VI will come out first...
Yeah, they're taking way too long, that's strange.
I think it's because we sometimes step on the crops by accident.
Makes sense... well, be a bit more careful please.
